# Task: Generate Blog Post About AI Automation

## Description
Write a comprehensive blog post about AI automation in business processes.

## Requirements

- [ ] Introduction to AI automation
- [ ] Key benefits for businesses
- [ ] Real-world examples
- [ ] Implementation considerations
- [ ] Future trends
- [ ] Conclusion with call-to-action

## Target Audience
Business owners and managers looking to implement AI solutions.

## Tone
Professional yet accessible, with practical insights.

## Length
1500-2000 words

## Output Format
Save as markdown file in `/Done` folder when complete.

## Completion Criteria
- [ ] All sections written
- [ ] Content reviewed for accuracy
- [ ] File saved to `/Done` folder
- [ ] [x] COMPLETED marker added

---
